sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.summary: It seems Nvidia ( NASDAQ: NVDA ) is a victim of its own success. After another incredible quarter in which it doubled its earnings per share ( EPS ) year over year, the chipmaker's stock sank in the days following its Q3 numbers release. The fact is, expectations could hardly be higher.
